messages.text:
Hi there! 👋 I'm **Rux**, your Roblox Studio AI assistant. I'm connected to your Studio session and ready to help!

Here are some things I can do for you:

🔧 **Scripts** — Read, write, create, or debug Lua/Luau scripts
🏗️ **Building** — Add, modify, or inspect instances in your game world
🔍 **Search & Inspect** — Find code, variables, parts, and properties
🐛 **Debugging** — Check for errors and review output logs
📦 **Organization** — Manage folders, services, and your Explorer tree

What are you working on today? Let me know how I can help! 😊
